# Coin Wire — copy to .env and fill in values

# Telegram
TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN=
TELEGRAM_CHANNEL_ID=
TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID=

# YouTube (Coin Wire channel)
YOUTUBE_CRYPTO_CLIENT_ID=
YOUTUBE_CRYPTO_CLIENT_SECRET=
YOUTUBE_CRYPTO_CREDENTIALS_FILE=credentials/crypto_credentials.json
# After setup: tokens/coin_wire_token.json (auto-generated, do not commit)

# Stock media
PEXELS_API_KEY=
PIXABAY_API_KEY=

# Schedule: config/coin_wire.yaml (timezone America/New_York)
# Railway: mount volumes at /app/data and /app/tokens
